headline: International Paper breaks ground on $225m Brandon packaging plant
summary: The Brandon packaging facility is set to boost local jobs and modernise regional packaging production.

raw.headline: International Paper breaks ground on $225m Brandon packaging plant
raw.summary: The Brandon packaging facility is set to boost local jobs and modernise regional packaging production.

headline: International Paper (IP) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of packaging and materials company International Paper (NYSE:IP) jumped 4.1% in the afternoon session after the company announced its acquisition of Delmarva Corrugated Packaging (DCP) in Dover, Delaware.
